summary: Excellent sound‑board recording of a high‑energy show highlighted by a scorching St. Stephen and standout early‑set gems like Wang Dang Doodle and Jack Straw.
review: Fans rave about the night’s relentless energy, calling it one of the best they’ve heard – St. Stephen is described as a “cosmic” treat, while Wang Dang Doodle, Jack Straw, China Rider, Bertha and others are praised as breakout moments. The sound‑board source is reported as crisp and great, though listeners also recommend a matrix or audience feed for added ambience.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews are strongly positive about the performance; three of them award 4‑5 stars and note an excellent soundboard, yielding a high combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the sound board as great and crisp; one notes that a matrix or audience recording would capture the venue’s atmosphere, but no technical flaws are reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert maintains a high‑octane vibe from start to finish, with the first set packed with breakout performances and an especially electrifying second‑set pre‑drums run that leaves no weak links.

band_member_comments.Phil: Sang lead vocals on China Doll – a rare occurrence at the time.
